name: Certificate of Indigency
shortDescription: This proves that you have little income and need help for school or medical support.

details.longDescription: A Certificate of Indigency is a document issued by the barangay certifying that the holder is a resident of the barangay and is considered one of the less fortunate or low-income families in the community. It is often used to avail of government services and aid.

name: Barangay Certificate
shortDescription: Certifies that you are a resident of the barangay and a good resident.

details.longDescription: A Barangay Certificate is often required for various transactions to prove your residency in a specific barangay. It's a general-purpose document certifying your good standing in the community.

name: Barangay Clearance
shortDescription: Certifies that you have no derogatory records or cases in your barangay.

details.longDescription: This document certifies that the applicant is a resident of the barangay and has no pending cases or negative records within the community. It is often a prerequisite for obtaining other permits, like a Mayor's Permit or a business permit.

name: First-Time Job Seeker
shortDescription: First-time job seekers get government papers without paying fees.

details.longDescription: Under Republic Act 11261, first-time job seekers are exempt from paying fees for certain government-issued documents. This certificate from the barangay is the first step to availing this benefit.

name: Cedula (CTC)
shortDescription: Community Tax Certificate. An official document required for various transactions.

details.longDescription: The Community Tax Certificate (CTC), or Cedula, is a proof of identity and residence required for many government transactions.

name: Barangay Business Permit
shortDescription: A permit required before you can apply for a Mayor's Permit to operate a business.

details.longDescription: This permit is issued by the barangay to certify that your business is compliant with local barangay ordinances. It is a primary requirement for securing a Mayor's Permit.

name: Certificate of Residency
shortDescription: A document that officially states your home address in the barangay.

details.longDescription: Similar to a Barangay Certificate, but specifically used to prove your permanent or temporary address. It is often required by schools, employers, or banks.
requirements: Proof of Billing (e.g., Meralco, water bill)

name: Solo Parent ID
shortDescription: For solo parents to avail of special government benefits and support.

details.longDescription: The Solo Parent ID (R.A. 8972) provides benefits like parental leave, flexible work schedules, and educational or medical assistance to those raising children alone.
requirements: Proof of solo parent status (e.g., death certificate of spouse, affidavit)

name: PWD ID Application
shortDescription: Application assistance for Persons with Disabilities to avail of discounts and benefits.

details.longDescription: The barangay assists in the application for a PWD ID (R.A. 7277) which grants mandatory discounts (e.g., medicine, food, transport) and other government privileges.

name: Building Permit Clearance
shortDescription: A barangay-level clearance needed before applying for a city building permit.

details.longDescription: This certifies that the proposed construction or renovation in the barangay is not objected to by your neighbors and follows local zoning.

name: Barangay Certificate of Solo Parent
shortDescription: Certification issued to solo parents for eligibility under RA 8972.

details.longDescription: This certificate verifies that the applicant is a solo parent as defined by Republic Act 8972, granting eligibility for various benefits and services.

name: Barangay Clearance for Employment
shortDescription: Clearance certifying good conduct for job applications.

details.longDescription: This clearance certifies that the applicant has no derogatory records in the barangay and is suitable for employment purposes.

name: Certificate of Residency (Duplicate Copy)
shortDescription: Duplicate copy of residency certificate for lost or damaged originals.

details.longDescription: A duplicate certificate of residency issued when the original is lost, damaged, or requires replacement.

name: Certificate of Low Income
shortDescription: Certifies low income status for government assistance programs.

details.longDescription: This certificate confirms that the applicant belongs to a low-income household, qualifying them for various government assistance programs.
requirements: Income tax return or proof of income

name: Certificate of Good Conduct
shortDescription: Certifies that the applicant has no criminal record in the barangay.

details.longDescription: This certificate attests that the applicant has maintained good conduct and has no criminal or derogatory records within the barangay.

name: Barangay Business Closure Certificate
shortDescription: Certificate issued upon closure of a barangay-registered business.

details.longDescription: This certificate is issued to confirm the closure of a business previously registered with the barangay.

name: Certificate of Live-In Partnership
shortDescription: Certifies cohabitation and partnership status.

details.longDescription: This certificate acknowledges the live-in partnership status of two individuals cohabiting as a couple.

name: Barangay ID Application
shortDescription: Application for barangay-issued identification card.

details.longDescription: Application process for obtaining a barangay identification card, which serves as proof of residency and identity.

name: Barangay Blotter Report Copy Request
shortDescription: Request for copy of incident reports filed with the barangay.

details.longDescription: Request for certified copies of blotter reports documenting incidents reported to the barangay authorities.

name: Barangay Building/Construction Clearance
shortDescription: Clearance required for building or construction projects in the barangay.

details.longDescription: This clearance certifies that the proposed building or construction project complies with barangay zoning and safety regulations.

name: Barangay Certificate of Solo Parent
shortDescription: Certification issued to solo parents for eligibility under RA 8972.

details.longDescription: This certificate verifies that the applicant is a solo parent as defined by Republic Act 8972, granting eligibility for various benefits and services.
